app.name: OpenStudy
app.tagline: A Markdown-first structured question bank and practice system

install.title: Install Extras
install.skillDesc: Install the skill to use /openstudy commands directly in Claude Code. Let AI help you import documents, identify questions, grade answers, and analyze study data.
install.cliDesc: Install globally via npm to use the OpenStudy CLI in your terminal. Batch import, export, validate, and stats — ideal for scripting and CI/CD integration.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Quickly review library progress, study activity, and wrong-answer hotspots in one place.

progress.title: Library Progress
progress.emptyHint: Import and identify a document, then progress will show up here.

wrong.title: Wrong-Answer Hotspots
wrong.emptyHint: Once you start practicing, documents with the most wrong answers will gather here.

logs.title: Recent Identification Logs
logs.emptyHint: After you run identification, recent success and failure audits will appear here.

logs.title: Identification Logs
logs.subtitle: Review success, failure, and audit details for every identification run.
logs.emptyHint: Once you identify documents, full logs will appear here.
logs.emptyForDoc: No identification logs for this document

library.title: Library
library.emptyHint: Import Markdown content, or source material you want to turn into Markdown, to start practicing.

reset.confirm: Reset progress for this document? All attempt history under this document will be cleared.

errors.noQuestions: No questions found. Check if the document contains recognizable questions.
errors.tooLarge: File too large (over 10MB). Please split the document or reduce content.
errors.scannedPdf: This file does not contain usable text yet. Convert it into editable Markdown first.

delete.confirm: Delete this document and all its questions? This cannot be undone.

practice.title: Practice
practice.noQuestionsHint: Return to Library to identify questions, or choose another question range.

hint.shiftEnter: Shift+Enter for new line, Enter to submit

placeholder.short: Enter your answer (Shift+Enter for a new line, Enter to submit)

practice.redoBanner: Redo mode: from Wrong Book. Correct answers are automatically removed.

ask.title: Ask AI
ask.subtitle: Ask about this question’s concepts, reasoning, or why you got it wrong
ask.empty: You can type your own question or tap a quick prompt below.
ask.placeholder: e.g. What concept does this test?

quick.hint: Don’t give me the answer yet — give me a hint
quick.options: How should I tell these options apart?
quick.whyWrong: Why did I get this wrong?
quick.summary: Summarize the common trap in this question

exam.title: Exam Mode
exam.noQuestionsHint: Return to Library to identify questions first.

confirm.submit: Submit the exam? You cannot change answers after submission.
confirm.leave: You have unsaved answers. Leave anyway?

records.title: Practice Records
records.emptyHint: Start practicing to see your attempt history here.

wrongbook.title: Wrong Book
wrongbook.emptyForDoc: No wrong questions in this document.
wrongbook.emptyForDocHint: Choose another document or switch back to All.
wrongbook.removeConfirm: Remove this question from Wrong Book (not delete the question)?
wrongbook.clearAllConfirm: Clear entire Wrong Book? All attempt history will be deleted.

models.subtitle: Manage the language model configuration used by the app

llm.title: LLM Model
llm.apiKeyHint: Required for online services, not needed for local Ollama

theme.title: Appearance
theme.subtitle: Choose light, dark, or follow system

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Customize the keys used most often during practice. Changes save automatically.
shortcuts.hint: Click any shortcut, then press a key combo. Press {{cancel}} to cancel.

practiceSubmit.title: Submit answer
practiceSubmit.description: Submit the current answer in practice.

practiceNext.title: Next question
practiceNext.description: Move to the next question after results are shown.

practicePrev.title: Previous question
practicePrev.description: Return to the previous question in practice.

practiceRevealAnswer.title: Reveal answer
practiceRevealAnswer.description: Open the reference answer and explanation in practice.

practiceOptionPrev.title: Previous option
practiceOptionPrev.description: Switch to the previous option during practice.

practiceOptionNext.title: Next option
practiceOptionNext.description: Switch to the next option during practice.

insights.title: Insights
insights.empty: No recent attempts to analyze yet.
insights.emptyHint: Answer a few questions first. This page will show trends, and AI suggestions can be generated manually.

profile.title: Learner profile
profile.summary: {{archetype}}: {{attempts}} recent attempts across {{docs}} documents, active on {{activeDays}} days, with {{accuracy}} overall accuracy.

focus.title: Focus now
focus.none: There is not enough recent data yet.

ai.title: AI study suggestions
ai.subtitle: Use recent practice data to surface clearer next steps.
ai.emptyHint: Use the analyze action above to generate suggestions.

editor.title: Edit File
editor.empty: This document has no questions yet.
editor.emptyHint: Go to Library to identify questions, or add new ones
editor.leaveConfirm: You have unsaved question changes. Return to Library anyway?
editor.shortcutHint: {{saveCurrent}} to save current, {{saveAll}} to save all

fields.options: Options (one per line, suggest starting with A./B.)

markdownEditor.title: Identify & Edit
markdownEditor.leaveConfirm: You have unsaved content. Return to Library anyway?
markdownEditor.resetConfirm: Reset from original? Your edits will be lost.

precheck.title: Question precheck
precheck.noIssues: No obvious structure issues found. You can continue identifying questions.

markdownEditor.hint: Tip: After editing, click "Identify" and it will use your edited version.
markdownEditor.identifyHint: Use AI to identify and structure questions from Markdown. Make sure the Markdown format is clear before running.

conversations.title: Conversations
conversations.emptyHint: Once you ask AI during practice, each question's chat history will appear here.

templates.title: Question Templates
templates.subtitle: Show one Markdown standard based on the current UI language, and apply it throughout the PDF Word TXT to Markdown pipeline.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Claude Code slash commands provided by OpenStudy, for use in terminal and AI.

openstudy.title: OpenStudy Main Skill
openstudy.desc: OpenStudy AI Learning Workbench — structure study materials into questions for practice and exams.

ingest.title: Ingest & Identify
ingest.desc: Import a document and identify questions. Supports PDF, Word, PPT, Markdown and more.

identify.title: Identify Questions
identify.desc: Run AI question identification on an already-imported document.

validate.title: Validate Format
validate.desc: Check whether a Markdown or JSON file conforms to the OpenStudy standard format.

exam.title: Import Question Set
exam.desc: Import a question set in Standard Markdown or JSON format into a target document.

export.title: Export Questions
export.desc: Export a document's questions to Standard Markdown or JSON format.

grade.title: AI Grading
grade.desc: Use AI to grade short-answer and fill-in-the-blank responses.

insights.title: Learning Insights
insights.desc: Generate study suggestions and analysis reports based on recent wrong answers.

stats.title: Learning Stats
stats.desc: View overall or per-document study statistics.

settings.title: LLM Settings
settings.desc: View or modify the OpenStudy LLM configuration.

doctor.title: Environment Doctor
doctor.desc: Check the OpenStudy CLI environment and diagnose dependencies.
